name: openoutreach_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the openoutreach capability.

prompts.name: define_product_and_market
prompts.template: Describe your product in detail: {product_description}. Define your target market: {target_market}.
prompts.use_case: Sales teams generating targeted leads on LinkedIn for outbound marketing

prompts.name: initiate_lead_generation
prompts.template: Find leads on LinkedIn that match the product and market description provided.
prompts.use_case: Entrepreneurs and SMBs automating LinkedIn outreach to potential customers

prompts.name: send_connection_request
prompts.template: Send a personalized connection request to {lead_name} highlighting the value of {product_description}.
prompts.use_case: Recruiters sourcing candidates matching specific job requirements

prompts.name: follow_up_message
prompts.template: Send a follow-up message to {lead_name} referencing previous outreach and inviting engagement.
prompts.use_case: Marketing agencies running LinkedIn campaigns for client acquisition
